appraisal_events.evidence: Deux officiers... se plaignirent au directeur... On crut un moment que leur protestation aurait quelque efficacité. Mais... ils ne pouvaient en rien être utiles au directeur... Tandis que... planait sur Mlle Bloch la protection de M. Nissim Bernard.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents the director as ineffectual and deferential to influence, implying he will not enforce norms unless it serves his interests, thus lowering his standing.

status_effects.explanation: He appears compromised and weak, yielding to patronage rather than upholding order, which diminishes local esteem.
